title: FamilyTree
description: Single control file for a FamilyTree dataset, stored at .familytree/familytree.json

version.description: Semantic version of the spec this dataset conforms to

id.description: UUID v4 — the tree's stable identity

not_duplicates.description: Pairs of persons confirmed to be distinct individuals, suppressed from ft find-duplicates output

note.description: Free-text reason why these persons are distinct
